owned_checks: Registered taskpack exists under TASK_INBOX/REGISTERED.
Route manifest and extracted manifest are indexed.
Task registry changes are included in file delta index.
learned_rules: Post-work bundles must preserve taskpack provenance and route evidence.
A completed task needs next-task routing evidence, not just a commit.
warnings: Registered intake route lists eight organs; post-work admission ring adds narrow Custodes as the ninth organ.

owned_checks: Servitor role entry receipt exists.
Owner-facing final summary is Russian after role entry.
Machine receipts remain English UTF-8 without BOM.
learned_rules: Final owner communication belongs under Officio language discipline.
Role entry evidence must precede task mutation.

owned_checks: Bundle contract, schemas, index card, manifest, receipt index, and delta index exist.
Checker produces structural pass or block only.
Heavy artifact policy is represented.
learned_rules: A post-work bundle is a historical delta, not just a narrative report.
GitHub receives indexes and small canonical evidence, not unbounded local dumps.

owned_checks: Standard-library checker exists and is runnable.
No package installation is required.
Validation commands are captured in Mechanicus receipt.
learned_rules: Bundle admission must be executable as a command, not only documented.
Future expansion should add schema validation without introducing dependencies unless approved.

owned_checks: Scope limits are recorded in contracts and receipts.
Forbidden PASS claims are listed.
Ancient Empire and parent paths remain outside active runtime.
learned_rules: No final PASS without evidence receipts and remote proof.
Post-work checker authority must be bounded to the checks it actually performs.
warnings: No full semantic truth claim is made by this V0.1 layer.

owned_checks: Fake-green scan receipt exists.
Dirty-state origin is separated between registered task input and task-created output.
Self-reference boundary is explicit for closure receipts.
learned_rules: Pending evidence must be named as pending, not converted into PASS.
Receipt claims must match validator authority.
warnings: Remote equality is proven only after push by final no-write commands.

owned_checks: Micro and macro deltas are indexed.
Next recommended route is recorded.
KPD is limited to measurable structural coverage.
learned_rules: Next task routing is part of completion evidence.
Macro delta should be represented as durable contracts and tools.

owned_checks: Enhanced Ghost Evolve receipt exists.
Reusable contracts, schemas, template, checker, and next-task route exist.
Teaching is stored in repo artifacts, not only final response.
learned_rules: Organ learning must be made executable or inspectable through repo-visible artifacts.
Future tasks should reuse the receipt template and checker before final PASS.

owned_checks: All nine required organs have receipt rows.
No organ receipt is missing required V0.1 fields.
Custodes scope remains narrow organ matrix audit only.
learned_rules: Custodes can audit required receipt matrix shape without claiming full admission authority.
Missing organs should block or carry explicit limitation routing.
warnings: This task does not create a full Custodes/Throne runtime organ.
